creator: mohacsi@niif.hu
text:
graphics/gnash port does not install firefox plugin even if you select the WITH_PLUGIN option

Fix: 

Comment out 
	CONFIGURE_ARGS+=        --disable-plugin
	line in Makefile and plugin will be generated. 
	It requires further investigation why WITH_PLUGIN options is not honored.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try to install gnash with WITH_PLUGIN options and you won't find libgnashplugin.so under /usr/local/lib/browser_plugins
